chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 124 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.582/2025 2. For orders on Misc. No.583/2025 3. For hearing of main case 15.01.2025 Syed Hassan Ali, advocate for the petitioner 1. Granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Petitioner seeks to set aside the allotment cancellation order in respect of an immoveable property dated 03.01.2022. Petition has been preferred on 13.01.2025; therefore, petition is prima facie barred by laches. In view of the foregoing petition is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Amjad
